custom.title: Construction
custom.content: Backbone: pUC19. Gibson Assembly. Primers: oFW1, oRV1.

elements.label: Construct B
elements.desc: Reporter fusion from Construct A + GFP module.

custom.title: Construction
custom.content: Backbone: Construct A. Restriction cloning BamHI/EcoRI.

elements.label: Fluorescence Microscopy
elements.desc: Confocal imaging of Construct B in HEK293 cells.

custom.title: Protocol
custom.content:
1. Transfect HEK293 with @Construct B
2. Incubate 48h at 37°C
3. Fix with 4% PFA
4. Image on Leica SP8 (488nm excitation)

elements.label: Knockout Line X
elements.desc: CRISPR KO of gene X in HEK293. Verified by sequencing.

elements.label: Rescue Construct
elements.desc: Re-express gene X in @Knockout Line X to confirm phenotype rescue.

elements.label: Growth Assay
elements.desc: Compare growth rate: WT vs @Knockout Line X vs @Rescue Construct.

custom.title: Protocol
custom.content:
1. Seed 10k cells per well (96-well plate)
2. Measure confluence every 12h (IncuCyte)
3. 5 biological replicates per condition

elements.label: RNA-Seq
elements.desc: Transcriptome comparison WT vs @Knockout Line X.

goals.label: Reporter System
goals.desc: Establish and validate a fluorescent reporter system.

goals.label: Gene X Knockout
goals.desc: Characterize the role of gene X using CRISPR knockout.
